Domestic Box Office $85,105,259Details
International Box Office $106,826,899
Worldwide Box Office $191,932,158

Total $98,428,301

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,624,548 (27.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$85,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,833 opening theaters/3,833 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $146,952,741

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 29th, 2006 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: January 30th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some rude humor, mild action and brief language
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: Open Season
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Hunting, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Sony Pictures Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
